title: nageia nivalis
intro: Nageia nivalis, also known as the Himalayan nageia, is a species of coniferous evergreen tree that belongs to the Podocarpaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nageia nivalis include the potential relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower fever and reduce pain. Nageia nivalis is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be obtained from the leaves, bark, or resin of the plant.
